stemHtml: The ident of a DME in case of collocation with a VOR is as follows:

options.a: the DME ident comes up every 10 seconds at an audio frequency of 1020 Hz.
options.b: in 40 seconds the DME ident will sound once.
options.c: in 30 seconds the DME ident comes up 3 times at an audio frequency of 1350 Hz.
options.d: in 40 seconds the DME ident will sound twice.
